title: Comply with industry animal welfare requirements
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Comply with industry animal welfare requirements demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine and identify animal welfare requirements

pcs.text: Determine legislative, regulatory, industry and workplace animal welfare requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete appropriate record keeping of workplace animal welfare concerns and actions taken.
